016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonCreator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;
020import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
021import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
022
023import java.util.List;
024import java.util.Optional;
025
026/**
027 *
028 */
029public class ChainTip {
030    private final int height;
031    private final Sha256Hash hash;
032    private final int branchlen;
033    private final String status;
034
035    @JsonCreator
036    public ChainTip(@JsonProperty("height")     int height,
037                    @JsonProperty("hash")       Sha256Hash hash,
038                    @JsonProperty("branchlen")  int branchlen,
039                    @JsonProperty("status")     String status) {
040        this.height = height;
041        this.hash = hash;
042        this.branchlen = branchlen;
043        this.status = status;
044    }
045
046    public int getHeight() {
047        return height;
048    }
049
050    public Sha256Hash getHash() {
051        return hash;
052    }
053
054    public int getBranchlen() {
055        return branchlen;
056    }
057
058    public String getStatus() {
059        return status;
060    }
061
062    /**
063     * Find the active chain tip if there is one
064     * @param chainTips the list to search
065     * @return non-empty optional if active is found, empty optional if not found
066     */
067    public static Optional<ChainTip> findActiveChainTip(List<ChainTip> chainTips) {
068        return chainTips.stream().filter(tip -> tip.getStatus().equals("active")).findFirst();
069    }
070
071    public static ChainTip findActiveChainTipOrElseThrow(List<ChainTip> chainTips) {
072        return findActiveChainTip(chainTips).orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("No active ChainTip"));
073    }
074
075    /**
076     * Construct an "active" {@link ChainTip}
077     *
078     * @param height best block height
079     * @param hash best block hash
080     * @return current "active" ChainTip
081     */
082    public static ChainTip ofActive(int height, Sha256Hash hash) {
083        return new ChainTip(height, hash, 0, "active");
084    }
085}
